_comment: Multi-hook sidecar. Drop next to a clip in 00_source_videos/ as <stem>.json. The pipeline produces hooks × recipes outputs per source.
hooks:
POV you wear oversized clothes
and he still notices everything

the way he locks in even
when i'm in three hoodies

no because why does he clock me
through the baggy fit

tell me why he can see me
under all these layers

me when i dress like a marshmallow
and he's still staring

imagine wearing a tent
and he's still hooked

the fact that i'm in his hoodie
and he can't look away

wearing his clothes hits different
ngl

nothing like dressing baggy
and watching him stare
_hook_strategy: 10 genuinely different hooks → 10 different post angles. Combined with 8 default visual recipes = 80 outputs/source. Use --recipes flag at runtime to render fewer.
_recipes_options: null = use all 8 default recipes. Or list a subset.
_caption_color_options: light = white text + black stroke (dark/mixed bg) | dark = black text + white stroke (bright bg) | auto = sample frame at 30% mark and pick (default)
notes: 10 hooks × 8 recipes = 80 silent captioned outputs per source clip
